title: Car Editing Reels Website

requirements.text: Create a homepage that showcases featured car editing reels with hero banner, featured reel cards displaying thumbnail, title, uploader name, view count, and a call-to-action to explore more reels.

quotes: create a website for car editing reels

acceptanceCriteria: Homepage renders a hero section with site branding and tagline
Featured reels section shows at least a grid of reel cards
Each reel card displays thumbnail image, title, uploader, and view count
CTA button navigates to the browse/gallery page

requirements.text: Implement a reel upload and submission form where users can submit a car editing reel by providing a title, description, video URL (e.g., YouTube/Vimeo embed link), thumbnail URL, and tags/category. Store submissions in the backend.

quotes: create a website for car editing reels

acceptanceCriteria: Upload/submit page renders a form with fields: title, description, video URL, thumbnail URL, and tags
Form validates required fields before submission
Submitted reels are persisted in the Motoko backend
User receives a success confirmation after submission

requirements.text: Build a browse/gallery page where users can explore all submitted car editing reels, with filtering by category/tag and a search input. Display reels in a responsive grid layout.

quotes: create a website for car editing reels

acceptanceCriteria: Browse page displays all reels in a responsive grid
Tag/category filter buttons narrow the displayed reels
Search input filters reels by title or description
Clicking a reel card navigates to the reel detail page

requirements.text: Create an individual reel detail/playback page that embeds and plays the video, shows the full title, description, uploader, tags, and view count. Increment the view count each time the reel detail page is visited.

quotes: create a website for car editing reels

acceptanceCriteria: Reel detail page renders an embedded video player using the stored video URL
Full title, description, uploader name, tags, and view count are displayed
View count increments on each page visit via a backend call
Page includes a back navigation link to the browse gallery

requirements.text: Apply a dark, cinematic visual theme across the entire site: deep black/dark-grey backgrounds, bold white and amber/orange accent colors, sleek sans-serif typography, and edge-lit card components. The layout should feel like a high-energy automotive media platform with full-width sections and dramatic spacing.

quotes: create a website for car editing reels

acceptanceCriteria: Global color palette uses deep black/dark-grey backgrounds with amber/orange accents
Typography uses bold, modern sans-serif fonts
Cards have a subtle glowing border or edge-lit effect
Theme is applied consistently across all pages and components

requirements.text: Use the generated hero background image (hero-banner.dim_1920x600.png) as the homepage hero section background.
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage hero section renders the generated image as a full-width background
Image is loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1920x600.png

constraints: All backend logic must reside in the single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo
Video playback must use embed URLs (YouTube/Vimeo); no direct video file uploads or streaming infrastructure
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Real-time features such as live comments or notifications
Direct video file upload or hosting

required: Dramatic wide cinematic shot of a dark racetrack at night with motion-blurred sports cars and orange-amber light streaks, dark sky atmosphere (hero-banner.dim_1920x600.png)
Minimalist stylized side-profile silhouette of a sleek sports car with glowing amber outline on black background (reel-placeholder-thumb.dim_640x360.png)
